name: metal room
hints: This room has hydroponics (alien plant growing) and a display case. Examine both carefully.
The display case may contain something useful. Try to OPEN or LOOK at it. The hydroponics suggest this is a food production area.
LOOK DISPLAY to examine the case. You can GO into the open display case. Go NORTH to continue to the tunnel leading to the red metal rooms.
notes: Hydroponics and display case room. The display case can be entered (leads to room 17 with a button). Going through the force field leads back to room 4. North exit leads to tunnel (room 19) toward the red rooms.
